characters.description: An Arbitage professor and rank-four mage who learns that Azel died protecting Lee. He awaits an explanation of Lee's condition after the attack.
characters.name: Noah Vines

characters.description: Noah's partner and fellow teacher, who returns from the attack and reports that Azel died protecting Lee.
characters.name: Moxie

characters.description: A demon companion and co-teacher whose condition remains unexplained after the attack that killed Azel.
characters.name: Lee

characters.description: A demon formerly linked to Noah's soul. He is reported dead after protecting Lee during the attack that opens the book.
characters.name: Azel

characters.description: A Linwick ally sent in connection with the threat from Wizen. He reaches the aftermath of the Inquisitor attack too late to join the fighting.
characters.name: Brayden

characters.description: One of Noah's students and a sword fighter who returns safely from the attack.
characters.name: Alexandra

characters.description: A rank-five Inquisitor whose blood-magic domain traps Noah's companions. He is hunting the demon among them and threatens Moxie during the confrontation.
characters.name: Raphael

characters.description: Arbitage's transport-cannon operator. His effort to save the group during the attack convinces Noah that he can be trusted with confidential help.
characters.name: Tim

characters.description: A hostile plant-and-mind mage pursuing an unknown objective connected to the Torrin family. Noah's group begins sharing evidence about him with Arbitage's enforcers.
characters.name: Wizen

characters.description: An enforcer ally who accepts evidence from Noah and draws his group into the investigation of Wizen.
characters.name: Silvertide

characters.description: An enforcer with expertise in old runes. Silvertide suggests consulting him about a rune-worked dagger tied to Wizen's activities.
characters.name: Nair

characters.description: A deity observing Noah's group who sees potential value in his unusual progress and remains interested in their survival.
characters.name: Renewal

characters.description: A deity who regards Noah as an experiment and accelerates a lethal challenge against his group.
characters.name: Decras

characters.description: The figure who intercepts Decras's approaching rank-seven apostle before the threat reaches Arbitage.
characters.name: Revin

characters.description: A rank-seven apostle sent to kill two weaker targets near Arbitage. Revin intercepts him before he can reach them.
characters.name: Audren

characters.description: A resident of Noah's nominal dorm room who shares the space with Contessa and helps care for Mascot.
characters.name: Karina

characters.description: Noah's student and an inventive imbuer. He is broadening his pattern from a single elemental technique into a general method for imbuements.
characters.name: Todd

characters.description: Noah's student and a sword fighter whose pattern builds pressure from strike to strike, resembling a gathering landslide.
characters.name: Isabel

characters.description: One of Noah's students, who returns safely after the attack on Moxie's group.
characters.name: Emily

characters.description: Revin's student, temporarily training with Noah's class. He presents himself as exceptionally lazy even while keeping pace with the others.
characters.name: James

characters.description: Wizen's rank-five fire-mage operative, who battles Noah and Brayden beneath Arbitage's transport cannon.
characters.name: Barb

characters.description: A secret light healer allied with Barb in the chamber below Arbitage's transport cannon. He escapes detection by domains, then closes in and attacks Noah.
characters.name: Hidden healer

characters.description: A light-magic healer working with Barb for Wizen. Noah and Brayden identify him during the enforcers' response to the key theft.
characters.name: Richard

characters.description: The head of Arbitage's advanced track and an enforcer. In the aftermath of the key theft, he protects his instructors' duty to their students while helping organize the response.
characters.name: Godric

characters.description: A former Church agent who chooses to remain with Garina instead of continuing his mission, leaving them vulnerable to Church retaliation.
characters.name: Ferdinand

characters.description: A powerful local authority whose attention Audren avoids attracting during his clash with Revin.
characters.name: Garina

characters.description: An advanced-track professor who arrives to escort Noah and Moxie to an early meeting with another professor.
characters.name: Ulya

characters.description: A small companion associated with Noah whose unexplained departure from his usual place causes concern.
characters.name: Mascot

characters.description: A Heron water mage in the advanced track. He warns Noah that Torrin-connected figures plan to make Emily fail out, while presenting himself as a competitive rival seeking stronger opposition.
characters.name: Verud

characters.description: A Torrin professor in the advanced track whom Ulya identifies, along with his two students, as a figure Noah's group should watch.
characters.name: Jacob

characters.description: A rank-two Torrin student from a prominent branch of the family. He is positioned to challenge Emily during the advanced-track gathering.
characters.name: Marley

characters.description: An unnamed female student identified as one of the two students accompanying Jacob.
characters.name: Jacob's female student

characters.description: A rank-four professor who challenges Noah during an advanced-track meeting.
characters.name: Magus Anthony

characters.description: A King-family treasurer and collector of unusual runes who is linked to the purchase of Violet Transference.
characters.name: Otto

characters.description: Otto's masked assistant, who completes a rune exchange and guides Noah toward a restricted King-family hunting ground.
characters.name: Bird

characters.description: A former aide to Evergreen who now shares Noah's nominal dorm room with Karina. She cares for Noah's companion and says her life has improved since leaving Evergreen's service.
characters.name: Contessa

characters.description: The unnamed head of the Linwick family has Brayden deliver a spatial message token summoning Noah to a meeting concerning Tim.
characters.name: Linwick family head

characters.description: A Linwick mage who arrives after Noah's disappearance with people indebted to him. He commits their help to keeping Noah's students together and continuing their education.
characters.name: Jalen

characters.description: A masked musician who distributes food to hungry residents of a demon city as part of a mysterious new faction.
characters.name: Masked stranger

characters.description: A starving young demon who helps protect three companions. After accepting food from a masked stranger, he is compelled to guide the stranger toward the gang controlling his district.
characters.name: Young street lord

characters.description: A young demon and protective companion within a starving four-person group approached by a masked stranger.
characters.name: Violet

characters.description: A rank-three extortionist whose gang controls the district approached by a masked stranger and two young guides.
characters.name: Local street lord

characters.description: The local street lord's executioner and second-in-command, encountered at the gang's market-square headquarters.
characters.name: Local street lord's executioner

characters.description: Noah's masked identity in the demon city is revealed. As Spider, he uses food, concealed magic, and a manufactured reputation to build the influence needed to search for Wizen and a route home.
characters.name: Noah Vines

characters.description: The sister and second-in-command of a neighboring street lord, present when her brother refuses Spider's demand.
characters.name: Neighboring street lord's sister

characters.description: A rank-three demon who feeds on fear. She joins the young street lord as an instructor and ally, exchanging knowledge about demons for food and agreed limits on how much energy he may take from her.
characters.name: Fear-feeding demon

characters.description: The Silent Silver Tooth's rank-three second, expected to arrive with several guards to negotiate with Spider's group.
characters.name: Silent Silver Tooth representative

characters.description: A powerful figure who receives a report on Spider's expansion and orders her subordinate to continue watching the faction firsthand.
characters.name: Unnamed mistress
